steps.title: Express h in terms of k
steps.content:
Solve the first equation for $h$, then substitute for $j$:
$$h=\frac{0.56}{0.40}j$$
$$h=1.4(0.50k)=0.70k$$

steps.title: Convert to a percentage
steps.content: Since $h=0.70k$, $h$ is $70\%$ of $k$. The question says to disregard the percent sign. The answer is 70.
